title: cyclanthus indivisus
intro: Cyclanthus indivisus, also known as the Spiny Pithaya or Soursop of the Andes, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyclanthaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, with the roots and stems containing compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclanthus indivisus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant protection, making it a promising natural remedy for various health issues. In terms of herbal preparations, Cyclanthus indivisus can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and stems can also be dried and used in powder form for medicinal purposes.
